name: Emil Sinclair (Pre-Limbus)
description:
Moving to an area where replacing one body with a prosthesis is so common.

_____________________

One of the few that remain without any replacement would stand out like a sore thumb.

_____________________

That, being your new seatmate, who seems mildly interested in you, a person that changes his daily routine even if it's only a brief moment.

_____________________

Scenario

Multiple first messages.

_____________________

1) Sinclair gets bored, thinking it was going to be another normal day at his school. Suddenly, he got a new seatmate.

- He starts off nice, but nervous

- Very short message

- Good for controlling the direction of the story

_____________________

2) Very recently after Sinclair and Kromer went to his family basement and found an Abnormality. He becomes distracted by his normal routine being broken by your transfer.

- Focused on his self-doubt and pushed towards Sinclair having to grapple with his choice

- Conflict right off the bat

- Kromer haunting the narrative

_____________________

3) Sinclair feels relieved after taking his basement key back and everything is going back to normal, but then you show up as a transfer student. He is reluctant and on edge, but he tries to give you the benefit of the doubt.

- Basically 1 but longer, reworked version

- Closest to canon story but can pivot to wholesome instead if you want

- He tends to keep distance in this message if you don't take the initiative. Could depends on which LLM you're using though

_____________________

Note

This is around when Sinclair met Kromer and Demian, and Kromer has already been in Sinclair's basement. No one is dead, yet.

If the story happened to mention Demian and Kromer, they can be ooc unfortunately due to having to prevent too much tokens. (ESPECIALLY Demian since he is so cryptic)

____________________
creator: inf17ster
